@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
hide circle

class App {
    + main()
    + start()
}

class FileHandler {
    + promptFile():String
    + writeListToFile():void
    + readListFromFile():ArrayList<String>
}

class item {
    - LocalDate dueDate
    - String desc
    
    + getDesc()
    + getDate()
    + setDesc()
    + setDate()
}

class HomeScreenController {
    # ObservableList<OL> Lists
    
    + viewListsClicked()
    + listClicked(nameOfList,mode)
    + addBlankListClicked()
    + addExistingListClicked()
    + editListClicked()
    + saveAllListsClicked()
    + confirmDeleteClicked()
}

classList ScreenController {
    # ObservableList currentlist
    
    + filterBoxChanged()
    + savetoStorage()
    + addNewitemclicked()
    + deleteSelectedclickd()
    + completeboxchanged(item)
    + itemdescchangeed(item)
    + itemdueatechaged(itm)
    + itemselcteditm())
    
App --|>HomeScrenContoller : extends 
Ap --> ListScreeConroller : extens 

FieHander o-- HomescreenControlle  
FilHndler os- LstScrnnCotrolr  

Iteem oo--> HomescrnContrller   
Itmeo->Lisccntrollerr   

@enduml
